title: Hybrid Smart Riser v3.3 for Ultra-Deep REY Mud Lifting
classification_ja: 超深海REY泥揚鉱・スマートライザー輸送遷移理論
central_claim: reduced-order pre-engineering transport-transition theory, not field-validated offshore mining system
recommended_minimum_region: uss ≥ 1.4 in the current reduced-order model
practical_margin_region: uss ≈ 1.6–2.0 in the current reduced-order model
claim_boundary: No sea-trial validation, final riser design, production-ready mining equipment, safety certification, or full 3D offshore validation claim.
